text: The farm has two thousand hectares.
The harvest runs from January to March.
We store the soybean in two silos.
Ten trucks carry the crop to the port.

Hi Zilaudio, this is David from the trading company in Chicago. Thank you again for the call last week. My team wants to understand your operation better, so I have a few questions about the numbers. How many hectares does the farm have in total? How much soybean do you produce in a good season? And how many trucks do you use to move the crop from the fields to the port? One more thing: do you have your own storage on the farm, or do you rent a silo? If you can send me these numbers by email, that helps us a lot. Thank you, and talk to you soon.

Good morning, and here is the farm report for this week. The weather stays dry across Mato Grosso, with strong sun from Monday to Thursday. A little rain arrives on Friday, and that is good news for the fields. The soybean price goes up again this week, so it is a good moment to sell. Buyers in China want more, and the trucks are busy on the roads to the port. For the next season, the experts say the yield will be high, if the rain comes at the right time. That is the report. Have a good week on the farm.
The farm has two thousand hectares.
How many trucks do you use?
How much rain do you get in the season?
The harvest runs from January to March.
We grow soybeans on the farm.
In a good season, it produces fifty tons.
We store the soybean in two silos.
It produces fifty tons per hectare.
